THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, RAYMOND WONG, LORRAINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAO, TIM IND/DBA TIM'S AUTO BODY VUONG, DANNY IND/DBA DB AUTO BODY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2160 FOLSOM ST.
